issue_sections.name: description
issue_sections.purpose: Summarize the research objective, hypothesis, and expected outcome.

issue_sections.name: context
issue_sections.purpose: Capture domain constraints, prior findings, and background needed for execution.

issue_sections.name: scope
issue_sections.purpose: Define impacted research assets, boundaries, and explicit non-goals for this slice.

issue_sections.name: acceptance_criteria
issue_sections.purpose: List deterministic completion checks for deliverables and research constraints.

issue_sections.name: technical_notes
issue_sections.purpose: Record methodological choices, assumptions, and implementation details.

issue_sections.name: testing_strategy
issue_sections.purpose: Specify validation checks, reproducibility tests, and regression guards.

issue_sections.name: edge_cases
issue_sections.purpose: Enumerate uncertain inputs, data anomalies, and boundary-condition handling.

issue_sections.name: example_usage
issue_sections.purpose: Provide concise examples showing expected experiment or tooling usage.

issue_sections.name: references
issue_sections.purpose: Link relevant plans, datasets, code paths, and supporting sources.
